text.title: Rails Patterns Core Rules
text.summary: 6 testable rules grounding the Service Object + ServiceResult patterns for Rails 7+. Each rule pairs a binary check + sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Exactly one `ServiceResult` class MUST exist at `app/services/service_result.rb`. Its public API MUST be `success?` / `failure?` / `value` / `errors`. CI MUST fail on a second definition or alternate API (`ok?`, `result?`).
rule.rationale: LLMs invent slightly different shapes per file; divergent APIs force controllers to handle every variation.

rule.statement: Service classes MUST accept `params:` and `current_user:` keyword args in `initialize`. The public API MUST be a single `call` instance method returning `ServiceResult`. Helpers MUST be private. Namespacing follows `Users::CreateService`.
rule.rationale: Consistent signatures make every service testable + discoverable the same way.

rule.statement: Mail, webhooks, search-index updates MUST run from `after_commit` callbacks, an outbox, or chained Sidekiq jobs. Calling `deliver_later` / external HTTP inside `ActiveRecord::Base.transaction` is forbidden.
rule.rationale: `deliver_later` inside a transaction enqueues before commit; rollback leaves the worker running against a non-existent record.

rule.statement: Controllers MUST call `params.require(...).permit(...)` and pass the permitted hash to the service. Services MUST NOT touch `params`, `request`, or any HTTP global.
rule.rationale: Strong Params enforce the allowlist at the HTTP boundary; passing raw params reintroduces mass-assignment risk.

rule.statement: `ApplicationController` MUST `after_action :verify_authorized` + `after_action :verify_policy_scoped` (Pundit). Every controller action MUST call `authorize @resource` or `policy_scope(Resource)` explicitly.
rule.rationale: Without `verify_authorized`, an agent adding a new action may forget `authorize` and leave it unprotected.

rule.statement: CI MUST run Bullet (N+1), Brakeman (security), bundler-audit (CVEs) on every PR and block merge on any failure.
rule.rationale: Without automated gates, N+1 regressions, SQL-injection patterns, and outdated gem CVEs ship to production.
